title: Assessor + retry skills live
body: A-stage now auto-runs assessor → writes improvement plan with ranked alternatives. R-stage can execute via retry.py (budget: 3/iter, accept if ΔA≥1). OPTIMIZATION_GUIDELINES.md codifies the undo/redo protocol. 11 playbooks registered, extensible like auto-resolver.

title: NAS needs one-shot manual step
body: SSH can't write to NAS (macOS TCC, same as LaunchAgents). Run 'mkdir -p /Volumes/dataset-jakeclaw/phgdh-project && bash ~/workers/bin/nas_backup.sh' from Terminal.app on W0 ONCE. See NAS_MANUAL_SETUP.md. Box queue now correct: 10 items with right folder IDs (figures/data/reports). Mode: macbook-only — I'll drain it next session.

title: Continuous task-advancer live
body: Was stalling between user interactions. Now: task_advancer ticks every 2 min, drives current task through PLEASER stages autonomously via per-task executor registry. Task 4.2 just kicked: L→E pending (Cheaha top-20 array sbatch).
